# Anti-patterns

## Forbidden visual/interaction patterns

| Anti-pattern | Why forbidden | Example / detection cue |
|---|---|---|
| Generic admin card grid | Too generic; weak product specificity | Dashboard of cards with no user workflow |
| Decorative gradient overload | Looks like demo, hurts professional tone | Multiple unrelated glows |
| Fake tabs with no state model | Hides missing IA/state design | Tabs only change labels |
